features: Package include:You will get 1 piece of clear pencil case and 3 pieces rulers(30 cm/12 inch,20cm/8inch,15 cm/6 inch),different lengths can be matched with each other or applied separately.
Material: Transparent pencil case is made of frosted PVC material,which is transparent,has a frosted surface,is soft to the touch, and is durable.The clear rulers are made of plastic.

Two Unit Scales:The straight rulers with accurate inch and centimeter dual-scales,can meet your different measurement requirements.The dual functionality makes the rulers versatile for both metric and imperial systems.
Transparent Design:The plastic pencil case is moderate transparency,avoids to reveal your privacy,but still can identify stuff in the bags.The zipper bag is easy to open and carry.
Application:Clear pencil case and ruler perfectly match,is widely used in in schools,math classes,office,home etc,perfect for students,teachers,artists,architects,workers,etc.
